title: Salvation
description: Salvation is the transition from spiritual death to being alive in Christ. The old carnal thought process is replaced by the mind of Christ.
speaker: Charles Muchemi

title: Christ in Us
description: God is a prepared Father who puts things in place before His children arrive. The three pillars of education: Reading, Exhortation, and Doctrine.
speaker: Charles Muchemi

title: Honour
description: Honour is identifying uniqueness or usefulness in others. Sow the seed of honour to reap the harvest of access.
speaker: Charles Muchemi

title: Humility
description: God resists the proud by allowing them to be destroyed by their own sin. Humility is a willingness to do the lowest services for Jesus' sake.
speaker: Charles Muchemi

title: Eternal Security
description: Salvation is God's work; dead men cannot save themselves. Believers are held by both the Father and the Son, and sealed by the Spirit.
speaker: Mark Mwangi

title: Faith
description: Faith is the substance of things hoped for. Hope looks to the future; faith says "I have it now". True faith is a heart response to the Word.
speaker: Lucy Auma

title: Fighting the Good Fight
description: The Word is the Sword of the Spirit, proceeding from the mouth. We fight from victory, not for it, being seated far above all powers.
speaker: Mark Mwangi

title: Grace: God's Preparation
description: Don't remain at the cross; rise with Christ to live eternal life now. Intimacy precedes dominion; we are called friends, not just servants.
speaker: Mercy Waweru
